=== yinyang_schema.nsl === OK
NucleScript diagnostics:
8:1: warning [E-STORE-SYNTHESIS-WITHOUT-SIMULATE]: store 'sample_a.txt' has Synthesis effect; use simulate store for no-hardware execution

✓ store into archive: Stored 'sample_a.txt' (30 bytes → 1 data + 3 parity = 4 strands, 4.00× redundancy, primer=P0000)
